name: product-release-gate
description: Create verifiable product-material gates and authorized phased production releases.

interface.shortDescription: Gate and authorize phased product releases
interface.longDescription: Create immutable manifests, execute fail-closed submission and release checks, validate external approvals, issue scoped authorization credentials, deploy through pre-production, canary, and full stages, retain HMAC-signed evidence with automatic rollback, verify production readback, and deliver a sealed report with exact mail readback.
defaultPrompt: Run the product release gate preflight.
Create a submission event for these build artifacts.
Run release checks for the final material.
Authorize and execute a phased production release.
